title: caladenia caesarea subsp. maritima
intro: Caladenia caesarea subsp. maritima, also known as the yellow spider orchid, is a subspecies of orchid native to Western Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which are said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Caladenia caesarea subsp. maritima include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce pain, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture, infusion, or ointment for use in herbal remedies, but it's worth noting that more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
